title: Styrofoam Insulation Calculator
shortDescription: Estimate how many styrofoam packages you need for walls, floors, roofs or foundations.
metaTitle: Styrofoam Insulation Calculator - Estimate Packages Needed
metaDescription: Calculate styrofoam insulation volume, area with waste and number of packages for facade, floor, roof or foundation insulation.
intro: Use this styrofoam insulation calculator to quickly estimate how many packages you need for a facade, floor, roof or foundation project. Enter the insulated area, thickness, package coverage, waste percentage and package volume to get practical results in seconds.
overview: This calculator helps you plan insulation material more accurately. It converts area and thickness into insulation volume, adds your waste allowance and estimates the number of packages based on coverage and package volume. It is useful for EPS insulation planning on walls, floors, roofs and foundations.
howItWorks: Enter the insulated area in square meters.
Set the insulation thickness in centimeters.
Provide the coverage per package and package volume.
Add the waste percentage for cutting and fitting losses.
Get the insulation volume, total area with waste and package count.
useCases: Estimating styrofoam packages for facade insulation.
Planning EPS quantity for floor insulation.
Checking material needs for roof insulation.
Comparing insulation requirements before purchasing material.

examples.title: Facade insulation
examples.input: 150 m2 area, 15 cm thickness, 5 m2 per package, 8% waste, 0.75 m3 package volume
examples.output: Shows the required insulation volume, adjusted area and estimated number of packages.
examples.description: Useful for ordering the right amount of EPS boards for external walls.

examples.title: Floor insulation
examples.input: 80 m2 area, 10 cm thickness, 4 m2 per package, 5% waste, 0.4 m3 package volume
examples.output: Displays material volume and package estimate for floor work.
examples.description: Helps avoid shortages when insulating under screed or slab.

faq.question: What does the styrofoam insulation calculator calculate?
faq.answer: It calculates insulation volume in cubic meters, the area including waste and the estimated number of packages needed.

faq.question: Can I use it for walls, floors, roofs and foundations?
faq.answer: Yes. The calculator is general enough for all common EPS insulation applications.

faq.question: Why do I need to enter waste percentage?
faq.answer: Waste covers trimming, cuts, fitting losses and small installation adjustments.

faq.question: Does package coverage or package volume matter more?
faq.answer: Both are useful. Coverage helps estimate surface needs, while package volume helps verify the total insulation volume.

seo.title: Styrofoam Insulation Calculator
seo.description: Calculate styrofoam insulation volume, area with waste and how many packages you need for walls, floors, roofs or foundations.
